query: Count all buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones.

1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch buildings in Drammen municipality using kommunenummer

3.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

executions.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenavn = 'Drammen';

SELECT
    bygningsid,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geometri, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkelen.bygningspunkt
WHERE
    kommunenummer = '3301';
